fields.title: sandbox: inject state + SANDBOX_CHANGE into user message
fields.description: Extension-only: inject initial sandbox state into system prompt on first turn; inject subsequent sandbox changes into latest user message content[0] as SANDBOX_CHANGE, emitting only the latest pending change (cycle-friendly).
fields.close_reason: Implemented first-turn system prompt sandbox state injection + cycle-safe SANDBOX_CHANGE injection as user message content[0] via context hook
